response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match for this role. His current position at re:cinq directly aligns — TypeScript, Node.js, AI-agent infrastructure, and MCP tooling are all explicitly listed, which is rare. With 10+ years of full-stack professional experience, a consistent record of ownership and delivery, strong testing culture evidenced by self-authored testing libraries and workshops, and hands-on cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), he clears the bar comfortably. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit NestJS and Vitest experience, and limited Kotlin background, but given his seniority and demonstrated adaptability across many stacks, these are learnable quickly.
strengths: Current role at re:cinq directly covers TypeScript, Node.js, AI-agent infrastructure, and MCP framework development — a near-exact match to the JD's primary stack and AI agent requirement
Exceptionally strong testing culture: authored D-lang testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), organized TDD and refactoring workshops, and applied TDD/CI/CD in production at RIDE Capital

Broad full-stack ownership across 10+ years: designed platforms end-to-end (GISCollective on Kubernetes), handled DevOps (GitLab CI, Docker, Artifactory), and shipped features across web, mobile, and backend
concerns: NestJS is not mentioned anywhere in the resume, and it is the core backend framework in the primary stack
Kotlin experience is absent; Java appears only briefly in a robotics context at Altom — the secondary stack requirement is largely unmet
Vitest, Jest, and Playwright are not explicitly referenced; testing framework expertise is demonstrated but with D-lang and custom tooling rather than the specified JS/TS ecosystem tools
